spec.name: A Shaded Path Through The Dense Forest
spec.description: You are on a small shaded path leading through the dense forest. The crowns of the old trees leave the forest floor in an unreal twililght illumination. To the north you see a small clearing. Paths lead east and west.

north.description: Through the underbrush you see a small clearing.

east.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

west.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

extra_descs.description: The shaded path is probably used by the small animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
